The residence

Solène

A one-bedroom sea-view residence in Plot F at Green Coast, Palasë — 87.95 m² with a 111.91 m² veranda, in the stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian.

Location within the resort

Solène · Plot F, Green Coast Resort

Floor plan

Solène · 1 Bed, Floor 4 · Green Coast Plot F

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.

Private veranda · 111.91 m²
87.95 m² total living area
Stone-built village · travertine & timber
